improvements: Less crowded layout: filters, listening, add-card, and backup sections are grouped with collapsible panels.
Flip view shows German, US English, and Dari in three large readable language cards.
Dari answer card uses RTL direction and larger line height.
Two synonyms are rendered as visible chips.
Pause/Resume function is defined and safe.
Listening playback changes the visible card before the voice starts.
Manual Dari fixes added for the 24 entries that were missing Dari in the B1 Plus source parse.
